title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: SALEM HEALTH CENTER OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. Vasectomy services provided at this site. Provides medication based abortion up to 11 weeks and surgical abortion up to 13 weeks and 6 days. 3825 Wolverine Street NE Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Individuals with an income below 250% federal poverty level Hours: Monday 9am-5pm, Tuesday 11am-7pm, Wednesday 12pm-7pm, Thursday 8:30am-5pm, Friday 8am-4pm, Saturday/Sunday-Closed Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Abortions Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Sterilization * Men Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - INFO FOR TEENS HUMAN REPRODUCTION - REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TRANSGENDER SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALEM HEALTH CENTER
